data.title: SlowMist Warning: Two suspicious transactions occurred on ETH and BSC chains. The attacked contract may be due to missing parameters in the swap function.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist Security Team issued a warning saying: "We detected two suspicious transactions using the same method on the ETH and BSC chains respectively. The attacked contract may have failed to check the incoming parameters in its swap-like function, allowing the attacker to construct malicious tokens and make profits. However, these contracts are not open source."

data.description:
With $1.6 trillion under management, why is Franklin Templeton doubling down on blockchain?

data.title: Ethereum’s Revenue Drops 92% As Solana Sees Explosive Growth
data.description:
Ethereum’s revenue has dropped significantly, while Solana continues to see remarkable growth. Data from DeFiLlama and Token Terminal shows Ethereum’s revenue fell 92.1% in week six of 2025. Meanwhile, Solana has outperformed Ethereum in multiple revenue metrics, fueled by increased memecoin trading and institutional adoption. Ethereum Struggles with Revenue Decline Ethereum experienced...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/13/ethereums-revenue-drops-92-as-solana-sees-explosive-growth/

data.title: ZkLend Initiates Investigation After Hack, Reports Submitted to Authorities
data.description: According to Odaily, zkLend has announced that due to the hacker's failure to contact the project team by the deadline, they have reported the incident to the Hong Kong police, the FBI, and the Department of Homeland Security, initiating an investigation. The investigation has revealed connections between the hacker and previous attacks on other DeFi protocols. The project team has been monitoring the flow of funds and has identified several related wallet addresses, with this information submitted to centralized exchanges. zkLend plans to announce a fund recovery and release strategy next week, while their security team is preparing a post-incident analysis report.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees $177 Million Liquidation in 24 Hours
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market experienced liquidations totaling $177 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $119 million of the liquidations, while short positions saw $57.78 million liquidated. Bitcoin faced liquidations amounting to $27.67 million, and Ethereum saw $26.46 million in liquidations.

data.title: Trump WLFI investment token cumulative floating loss narrowed to $49.153 million
data.description: On-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that after increasing WBTC and MOVE worth $6.41 million today, the accumulated floating loss of Trump WLFI's investment tokens has narrowed to $49.153 million. Among them, the multi-signature address still only holds ETH, BTC, and TRX, and most of the other actively purchased tokens have been recharged to Coinbase.

data.title: Bloomberg Announces Launch of Bloomberg Bitcoin & Gold Blend Indices
data.description: Bloomberg announced the launch of the Bloomberg Bitcoin & Gold Blend Indices, which is reportedly one of the multi-asset indices on the market that combines commodities and digital assets. It includes the Bloomberg Bitcoin and Gold Equal Weight Index (BBIG) and the Bloomberg USD, Bitcoin and Gold Equal Weight Index (BBUG). It is reported that the index supports customers to modify and customize the configuration weights. (Prnewswire)

data.title: usdx.money announces integration of Axelar cross-chain token service
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Stablecoin issuance protocol usdx.money announced the integration of Axelar's cross-chain token service (ITS). USDX and its yield token sUSDX have been natively deployed on 3 chains: Arbitrum, BNB Chain and Ethereum. USDX is a delta-neutral stablecoin pegged to $1, and sUSDX is a yield token generated by staking USDX into smart contracts to earn underlying trading income from CEX.
Axelar's cross-chain token service (ITS) enables tokens such as USDX and sUSDX to exist on more blockchains. With an existing TVL of $600 million, USDX is expected to achieve further growth on multiple chains using Axelar's technology.

data.title: Web3 new fund UFLY LABS debuts at Consensus HK, 50% of its invested projects have been TGE and listed on exchanges such as Binance, Ouyi, and Upbit
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 new fund UFLY Labs has become a sponsor of the Consensus HK conference and will participate in a number of theme events.
The founding team of UFLY Labs is composed of successful entrepreneurs and professional investors. Their rich entrepreneurial experience and deep understanding of technological innovation enable UFLY Labs to provide not only financial support to the invested projects, but also strategic guidance, resource docking and industry insights.
Fund founders Sean and Neal said that although the current market is sluggish, UFLY Labs is still actively deploying and focusing on AI and PayFi related fields. The fund's investment scope covers the world, focusing on North America, Europe, Asia and other regions with active technological innovation. At the same time, it will strengthen the application of AI technology, and further improve the scientificity and accuracy of investment decisions through the combination with AI technologies such as DeepSeek.
UFLY Labs will hold a unique founder invitation dinner in Hong Kong at 18:00 on February 19, 2025-"UFLY Labs Founders' Night". This event will bring together innovative projects and investment institutions from multiple fields such as Infra, AI, BTCfi, Payfi, Defi, etc., aiming to promote in-depth cooperation and exchanges within the Web3 ecosystem.

data.title: zkLend: Hackers did not respond before the deadline and will announce fund recovery and release plan next week
data.description: zkLend officials said that since the hacker did not contact the project before the deadline, the zkLend team has submitted an incident report to the Hong Kong Police, FBI and Department of Homeland Security and launched an investigation. The investigation showed that the hacker was related to previous attacks on other DeFi protocols. The project has monitored the flow of funds and identified multiple related wallet addresses, and the relevant information has been submitted to centralized exchanges. zkLend will announce a fund recovery and release plan next week, and the security team is preparing a post-analysis report.
